description: Maven SCM API defines the public interfaces and command/result model used by Maven SCM to perform source control operations. It provides shared abstractions for SCM repositories, file sets, changes, providers, commands, and exceptions so Maven plugins and clients can interact with different SCM systems through one API.

Maven SCM API defines the public interfaces and command/result model used by Maven SCM to perform source control operations. It provides shared abstractions for SCM repositories, file sets, changes, providers, commands, and exceptions so Maven plugins and clients can interact with different SCM systems through one API.
